title: AuditEvidenceSnapshot
description: Typed preservation manifest listing canonical evidence identities required for retention, export planning, and verification backfill checks. This manifest is not a substitute for underlying evidence objects.

digestList.description: Sorted, unique digest identity list for one evidence family.

created_at.description: RFC 3339 timestamp when the snapshot was generated.

segment_ids.description: Segment identifiers with sealed evidence in scope.

segment_seal_digests.description: Segment seal envelope digests committed in scope.

audit_receipt_digests.description: Audit receipt envelope digests in scope.

verification_report_digests.description: Audit verification report digests in scope.

runtime_evidence_digests.description: Runtime/signer evidence digests needed for verification context.

attestation_evidence_digests.description: Attestation evidence and verification digests where present.

instance_identity_digests.description: Stable instance identity digests preserved for cross-machine portability.

policy_evidence_digests.description: Policy decision digests linked to anchored evidence where present.

required_approval_ids.description: Required approval identifiers linked to preserved evidence where present.

approval_evidence_digests.description: Approval request and decision digests where present.

anchor_evidence_digests.description: External anchor evidence and sidecar digests where present.

provider_invocation_digests.description: Reserved extension point for provider invocation evidence digests.

secret_lease_digests.description: Reserved extension point for secret lease evidence digests.
